title: Inout port of structure type causes compile or bad result

features.name: inout port with unpacked struct type
features.description: Code should include an inout port declaration with an unpacked struct type defined via typedef

features.name: struct member access via assign through inout ports
features.description: Code should include an assign statement that reads from one inout struct port member and writes to another inout struct port member
features.snippet:
module mh1 (inout my_struct_t a, inout my_struct_t b);
assign b.x = a.x;
